best_fit_model.description: Name of model corresponding to best statistical fit of spectrum

cutoff_power_law.description: Fit parameters for Cutoff PowerLaw model

flux_density.description: Flux density in the specified flux_unit

flux_density_error.description: 1-sigma statistical uncertainty on flux density in the specified flux_unit

limiting_flux_density.description: Limiting flux density (upper limit) in flux_unit

limiting_flux_density_sigma.description: Significance level [sigma] of the limiting flux density. Default is 5 (5-sigma upper limit).

flux_density_unit.description: Unit of the flux density: frequency-based [erg/s/cm2/Hz], energy-based [erg/s/cm2/keV], or wavelength-based [erg/s/cm2/nm]

flux_density_energy_band.description: Low and High energy bounds used in flux density calculation (if not parsed in Reporter.schema), default unit is keV

flux_density_energy_units.description: Units for the spectral energy band (if not parsed in Reporter.schema), default unit is keV

flux_time_range.description: Start and stop time stamps used in flux density calculation (if not parsed in DateTime.schema.json), measured since trigger [s]

limiting_fluence_sigma.description: Significance level [sigma] of the limiting fluence. Default is 5 (5-sigma upper limit).

fluence_energy_range.description: Low and High energy bounds used in fluence calculation (if not parsed in Reporter.schema), default unit is keV

fluence_time_range.description: Start and stop time stamps used in fluence calculation (if not parsed in DateTime.schema), measured since trigger [s]
